name: language-learner-skill
description: Turn YouTube videos, audio files, or articles into a personal immersion-learning site with Whisper transcription, frequency-mined vocab, and SM-2 flashcards.

plugins.name: language-learner
plugins.description: Scaffold a self-hosted language-learning site from user-chosen content (YouTube / audio / text). Supports Thai, Chinese, Japanese end-to-end; Korean planned; generic regex fallback for whitespace-separated languages.
